Interface Cat.Type

All Superinterfaces:
Comparable<Cat.Type>, Keyed, OldEnum<Cat.Type>, RegistryAware
Enclosing interface:
Cat
public static interface Cat.Type extends OldEnum<Cat.Type>, Keyed, RegistryAware
Represents the various different cat types there are.

  • Method Details

    • getKey

      @NotNull @Deprecated(since="1.21.4") NamespacedKey getKey()
      Deprecated.
      A key might not always be present, use RegistryAware.getKeyOrThrow() instead.
      Return the namespaced identifier for this object.
      Specified by:
      getKey in interface Keyed
      Returns:
      this object's key
      See Also:
      • RegistryAware.getKeyOrThrow()
      • RegistryAware.isRegistered()

    • valueOf

      @NotNull @Deprecated(since="1.21") static Cat.Type valueOf(@NotNull String name)
      Deprecated.
      only for backwards compatibility, use Registry.get(NamespacedKey) instead.
      Parameters:
      name - of the cat type.
      Returns:
      the cat type with the given name.

    • values

      @NotNull @Deprecated(since="1.21") static Cat.Type[] values()
      Deprecated.
      use Iterable.iterator().
      Returns:
      an array of all known cat types.
